title: PWStop
description: A basic resource package that allows you to get a turquoise stop sign.
body:
## For correct work you need Optifine or [CITResewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)
Rename any sword or axe to "**PWStop**" so that it becomes Stop sign.

Made specifically for PWGood

> Subscribe to my [telegram channel](https://t.me/olarcyzm), you can also contact me there
